meaning: 江西(位于中国长江中、下游南岸)
examples: Willy Lin has cut back on free drumsticks in the canteen of his Jiangxi clothing factory as meat and vegetables grow dear.
The Tengwang Pavilion is in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province.
They started from Jiangxi, passed through several provinces and finally arrived in Shaanxi.
In southern Jiangxi province, solar power is also proving a headache for local authorities.
Jiangxi Copper was down 3.9%, Chalco fell 2.1% and Zijin Mining Group dropped 2.5%.
